display.name: Azure CDN Profile Overview
display.description: Out of the box dashboard for Azure CDN Profile.

display.name: azuremonitor.subscription_id
display.description: Subscription ID for your Azure Account

display.name: resource_group
display.description: Resource Group for your resources

display.name: cdnprofile
display.description: Name of the CDN Profile

display.name: Active WebSocket Connections
display.description: The number of active WebSocket connections.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Avg WebSocket Connection Duration
display.description: The average time taken by a WebSocket connection.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Byte Hit Ratio
display.description: The ratio of the total bytes served from the cache compared to the total response bytes.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Origin Health Percentage
display.description: The percentage of successful health probes from AFDX to backends.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Origin Latency
display.description: The time calculated from when the request was sent by AFDX edge to the backend until AFDX received the last response byte from the backend.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Origin Request Count
display.description: The number of requests sent from AFDX to origin.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: 4XX Error Rate
display.description: The percentage of all client requests for which the response status code is 4XX.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: 5XX Error Rate
display.description: The percentage of all client requests for which the response status code is 5XX.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Request Count
display.description: The number of client requests served by the HTTP/S proxy.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Request Size
display.description: The number of bytes sent as requests from clients to AFDX.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Response Size
display.description: The number of bytes sent as responses from HTTP/S proxy to clients.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: Total Latency
display.description: The time calculated from when the client request was received by the HTTP/S proxy until the client acknowledged the last response byte from the HTTP/S proxy.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: WAF CAPTCHA Request Count
display.description: The number of CAPTCHA requests evaluated by the Web Application Firewall.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: WAF JS Challenge Request Count
display.description: The number of JS challenge requests evaluated by the Web Application Firewall.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: WAF Request Count
display.description: The number of client requests processed by the Web Application Firewall.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'

display.name: WebSocket Connections
display.description: The number of WebSocket connections requested.

filter.expression: azuremonitor.subscription_id = $azuremonitor.subscription_id AND resource_group = $resource_group AND name IN $cdnprofile  AND type = 'Microsoft.Cdn/profiles'
